sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70414" key="neoth/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεοτήσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">youthful,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὥρη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:213" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">213</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σκίρτημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
